controls.name: Control Environment and Governance
controls.description: Establish integrity, ethical values, oversight, and accountability to support internal control over systems.
controls.severity_guidance: Primarily governance and documentation; evaluated for operating effectiveness over audit period (Type 2).
what_to_look_for: Identify documented policies, code of conduct, and governance structure for security and AI systems.
Review board/management oversight documentation and control ownership assignments.
Verify evidence of policy review and updates during the audit period.
AI systems not explicitly included in SOC 2 control scope or governance narratives.
Lack of executive visibility into GenAI usage and third-party foundation model dependencies.
No formal ownership assigned for AI model risk within SOC 2 framework.
typical_mitigations: Maintain documented governance framework with defined roles and review cadence.
Track periodic policy reviews and management attestations.
Ensure AI systems are explicitly included within scope of governance artifacts.

gap_example.title: Control Environment and Governance not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-CC1.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Control Environment and Governance partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard governance mapping and audit trail for this control.
Packaged governance evidence extract suitable for audit sampling.

covered_example.remediation: Maintain documented governance framework with defined roles and review cadence.

notes: Requires governance documentation and audit-period evidence beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: Risk Assessment Process
controls.description: Identify and analyze risks to the achievement of objectives, including risks from AI systems and third parties.
controls.severity_guidance: Risk assessment gaps may affect control design and audit outcomes.
what_to_look_for: Identify formal risk assessment process covering security, availability, confidentiality, and AI-related risks.
Review periodic risk assessments including AI/ML and third-party model providers.
Verify risk register updates and mitigation tracking during audit period.
Risk assessments exclude AI-specific threats (hallucination, prompt injection, model abuse).
No third-party risk evaluation for LLM/API providers.
Failure to reassess risks after material AI capability changes.
typical_mitigations: Implement documented risk assessment process including AI/ML risks.
Maintain risk register with ownership and remediation tracking.
Review and update risk assessment at least annually or upon material change.

gap_example.title: Risk Assessment Process not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-CC2.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Risk Assessment Process partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard governance mapping and audit trail for this control.
Packaged governance evidence extract suitable for audit sampling.

covered_example.remediation: Implement documented risk assessment process including AI/ML risks.

notes: Requires risk register artifacts and periodic review evidence beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: Control Activities (Policies and Procedures)
controls.description: Design and implement control activities to mitigate identified risks.
controls.severity_guidance: Control activity gaps affect both design and operating effectiveness.
what_to_look_for: Identify documented procedures for access control, change management, incident response, and AI model governance.
Review evidence that procedures were followed during the audit period.
Verify linkage between identified risks and implemented control activities.
AI guardrails or model governance controls not formally documented as control activities.
Prompt management and model configuration changes occurring outside defined procedures.
No linkage between AI risk register and implemented controls.
typical_mitigations: Define documented procedures aligned to identified risks.
Automate enforcement where possible and retain audit logs of execution.
Perform periodic control effectiveness reviews.

gap_example.title: Control Activities (Policies and Procedures) not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-CC3.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Control Activities (Policies and Procedures) partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard governance mapping and audit trail for this control.
Packaged governance evidence extract suitable for audit sampling.

covered_example.remediation: Define documented procedures aligned to identified risks.

notes: Requires procedural documentation and execution evidence beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: Logical Access Controls
controls.description: Restrict logical access to systems, data, and AI models to authorized users.
controls.severity_guidance: Direct impact on security and confidentiality commitments.
what_to_look_for: Identify IAM policies, RBAC configurations, and MFA enforcement for production systems and AI models.
Review periodic access reviews and removal of terminated users.
Verify monitoring of privileged access and anomalous activity.
Over-privileged access to AI model configuration, embeddings, or RAG data stores.
Missing MFA enforcement for production AI admin endpoints.
Unmonitored service accounts invoking high-risk AI actions.
typical_mitigations: Enforce least privilege and MFA for all privileged and production access.
Conduct periodic access reviews and document approvals.
Log and monitor privileged activity with alerting.

gap_example.title: Logical Access Controls not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-CC6.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Logical Access Controls partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard red-team scenario coverage and results relevant to this control.

covered_example.remediation: Enforce least privilege and MFA for all privileged and production access.

notes: Requires IAM configuration and operating evidence beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: System Monitoring and Incident Response
controls.description: Detect and respond to security incidents and system anomalies in a timely manner.
controls.severity_guidance: Security and availability commitments depend on monitoring effectiveness.
what_to_look_for: Identify monitoring tools, alert rules, and escalation procedures for production systems and AI services.
Review incident tickets and response evidence during audit period.
Verify post-incident reviews and corrective action tracking.
No monitoring of hallucination rates or unsafe output incidents.
Lack of logging for prompts, tool calls, or AI-driven decisions.
No alerting for anomalous AI behavior or abuse patterns.
typical_mitigations: Implement centralized monitoring and incident response program.
Define escalation thresholds and maintain incident runbooks.
Track incidents to closure and perform root cause analysis.

gap_example.title: System Monitoring and Incident Response not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-CC7.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: System Monitoring and Incident Response partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard red-team scenario coverage and results relevant to this control.

covered_example.remediation: Implement centralized monitoring and incident response program.

notes: Requires runtime monitoring outputs and incident records beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: Change Management
controls.description: Authorize, test, and document changes to systems and AI models.
controls.severity_guidance: Improper change control impacts reliability and security.
what_to_look_for: Identify change management workflow for code, infrastructure, and AI model updates.
Review evidence of peer review, testing, and approval before production deployment.
Verify rollback procedures and change tracking during audit period.
Untracked prompt or system message changes in production.
Silent model version upgrades from third-party API providers.
No rollback testing for degraded AI model performance.
typical_mitigations: Implement formal change control with approval gates and test requirements.
Require peer review and CI validation before merge/deployment.
Maintain rollback procedures and audit trail for all changes.

gap_example.title: Change Management not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-CC8.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Change Management partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard governance mapping and audit trail for this control.
Packaged governance evidence extract suitable for audit sampling.

covered_example.remediation: Implement formal change control with approval gates and test requirements.

notes: Requires ticketing system records and deployment evidence beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: Availability and Resilience Controls
controls.description: Ensure systems are available for operation and use as committed or agreed.
controls.severity_guidance: Availability failures may breach contractual commitments.
what_to_look_for: Identify redundancy, backup, and disaster recovery controls for production and AI infrastructure.
Review uptime metrics and SLA monitoring.
Verify periodic disaster recovery tests and evidence of results.
AI service dependencies lack redundancy or failover planning.
No monitoring of LLM provider uptime or API latency impact.
RAG/vector database outages not included in DR scope.
typical_mitigations: Implement backup and disaster recovery procedures with periodic testing.
Define RTO/RPO targets and monitor SLA compliance.
Document resilience architecture and failover testing.

gap_example.title: Availability and Resilience Controls not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-A1.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Availability and Resilience Controls partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard red-team scenario coverage and results relevant to this control.

covered_example.remediation: Implement backup and disaster recovery procedures with periodic testing.

notes: Requires operational uptime evidence and DR test artifacts beyond asset metadata.

controls.name: Confidentiality Controls
controls.description: Protect confidential information from unauthorized access and disclosure.
controls.severity_guidance: Direct privacy and contractual risk exposure.
what_to_look_for: Identify data classification scheme and controls protecting confidential data.
Review encryption at rest and in transit configurations.
Verify confidentiality agreements and access restrictions for sensitive datasets.
Prompts or model outputs containing confidential data logged without masking.
No data classification for embeddings or AI-generated artifacts.
Improper data retention for AI conversation histories.
typical_mitigations: Implement encryption, data classification, and strict access controls for confidential data.
Restrict access based on role and document periodic review.
Monitor and log access to confidential information.

gap_example.title: Confidentiality Controls not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of SOC2-C1.
evidence: No verifiable control design or operating effectiveness artifact found.

covered_example.title: Confidentiality Controls partially evidenced (design + operating evidence sample)

evidence.note: Control description and mapping to Trust Services Criteria.
Sample operating effectiveness evidence during audit period.
NuGuard red-team scenario coverage and results relevant to this control.

covered_example.remediation: Implement encryption, data classification, and strict access controls for confidential data.

notes: Requires data protection configuration and monitoring evidence beyond asset metadata.

scope_note: This control set reflects SOC 2 Type 2 requirements, focusing on both control design and operating effectiveness over a defined audit period, including AI systems within scope.
